nasb.text: She said, “The Philistines are upon you, Samson!” And he awoke from his sleep and said, “I will go out as at other times and shake myself free.” But he did not know that the Lord had departed from him.

esv.text: And she said, “The Philistines are upon you, Samson!” And he awoke from his sleep and said, “I will go out as at other times and shake myself free.” But he did not know that the Lord had left him.

cnv.text: 大利拉說：“參孫哪，非利士人上來捉你了！”參孫從睡夢中醒來，心裡說：“我要像前幾次一樣掙扎出去，必能脫身。”但他不知道耶和華已經離開他了。

ccb.text: 她喊道：“参孙，非利士人来捉你了！”参孙醒来，心想：“我要像前几次一样挣脱捆绑。”他却不知道耶和华已经离开他了。
